purpose: Build an e-commerce web platform where customers can browse products, manage cart, checkout, and view orders.
roles: Customer - User who browses products and places orders
Admin User - User responsible for managing orders and inventory
workflows: Order Placement Workflow - Workflow for placing an order
constraints: Use local generated outputs folder - Constraint to use local generated outputs folder
Use FastAPI backend - Constraint to use FastAPI backend
Use simple frontend for demonstration - Constraint to use simple frontend for demonstration
assumptions: Payment gateway is mocked - Assumption that payment gateway is mocked
Inventory data can be sample data - Assumption that inventory data can be sample data
Admin authentication can be basic for MVP - Assumption that admin authentication can be basic for MVP

acceptance_criteria.description: Products are displayed in a grid or list

functional_requirements.title: Product Details
functional_requirements.description: Display detailed information about each product

acceptance_criteria.description: Product details include price, description, and images

functional_requirements.title: Cart Operations
functional_requirements.description: Allow customers to add and remove products from cart

acceptance_criteria.description: Products can be added or removed from cart

functional_requirements.title: Checkout
functional_requirements.description: Allow customers to complete the checkout process

acceptance_criteria.description: Customers can enter payment information and submit order
Orders are successfully placed and stored in database

functional_requirements.title: Order History
functional_requirements.description: Allow customers to view their order history

acceptance_criteria.description: Customers can view a list of previous orders

use_cases.title: Admin User Managing Orders
main_flow: Step 1: Admin user views order history
